payload.title: cleanup: remove all legacy astrologer/temple/spiritual content — reposition for Aura Medical Institute
payload.body: Codebase audit reveals ~150+ legacy references to astrology, temples, pooja, rudraksha, and Vedic spirituality throughout the AuraEdu codebase. Full evidence in issue #2.
